description:
Super-fast endpoint for Z-Image Turbo, hosted by fal.ai. Excels at portrait photos and realistic images.

Notes:
Bot does not accept attachment.

Optional parameters:
- Set aspect ratio. Select from (16:9, 4:3, 1:1, 3:4, 9:16). It is set to 4:3 aspect ratio as default.
